examples: Bluefin tuna, which melts in your mouth, is still seen as a rare delicacy even now.

There are many types of tuna, and bluefin tuna is considered to be the highest grade of all.
Bluefin, while not given to the same balletic leaps as marlin or tarpon, are stubborn foes.
There are other reasons to worry about the Pacific bluefin, such as overfishing and mercury contamination.
